name: Arabic Language Certificate
text:
Arabic Language Certificate (BYU Center for Language Studies). This is the Arabic certificate. To earn the Arabic Language Certificate, complete one Arabic course in each of three categories -- Language, Civilization/Culture, and Literature. Arabic certificate course options:
1. Language Choose One: ARAB 302 or ARAB 426R 2. Civilization/Culture IHUM 242 3. Literature Choose One: ARAB 424R or ARAB 425R

name: Cebuano Language Certificate
text:

1. Language CEBU 321 2. Civilization/Culture CEBU 330 3. Literature CEBU 340

name: Chinese (Mandarin) Language Certificate
text:
Chinese (Mandarin) Language Certificate (BYU Center for Language Studies). This is the Chinese (Mandarin) certificate. To earn the Chinese (Mandarin) Language Certificate, complete one Chinese (Mandarin) course in each of three categories -- Language, Civilization/Culture, and Literature. Chinese (Mandarin) certificate course options:
1. Language CHIN 302 2. Civilization/Culture Choose One: ANTHR 343, CHIN 345R, HIST 340, or HIST 341 3. Literature Choose One: CHIN 342, CHIN 343, or CHIN 344

name: Portuguese Language Certificate
text:
Portuguese Language Certificate (BYU Center for Language Studies). This is the Portuguese certificate. To earn the Portuguese Language Certificate, complete one Portuguese course in each of three categories -- Language, Civilization/Culture, and Literature. Portuguese certificate course options:
1. Language Choose One: PORT 321*, PORT 323R (renumbered in Fall 2021 as 323A and 323B), PORT 325, PORT 326, PORT 360, or PORT 520 2. Civilization/Culture Choose One: PORT 321*, PORT 345, PORT 447R, PORT 355, PORT 457R, or PORT 395R 3. Literature Choose One: PORT 321*, PORT 330 *PORT 321 is required as one of the three courses. It must be taken first, and may be counted toward any of the three categories (Language, Civilization/Culture, or Literature). Students may count PORT 323A or 323B to satisfy one course requirement in either of the following scenarios: 1. If 321 is completed as the Literature course option, then complete an option from the Civilization/Culture course options and complete 323R as the Language course option. 2. If 321 is completed as the Civilization/Culture course option, then complete an option from the Literature course options and complete 323A or 323B as the Language course option. Note: For MSB students, MSB 596R can be used to satisfy one course requirement.

name: Russian Language Certificate
text:
Russian Language Certificate (BYU Center for Language Studies). This is the Russian certificate. To earn the Russian Language Certificate, complete one Russian course in each of three categories -- Language, Civilization/Culture, and Literature. Russian certificate course options:
1. Language Choose One: RUSS 321, RUSS 322, or RUSS 323 2. Civilization/Culture Choose One: RUSS 330 or RUSS 343 3. Literature Choose One: RUSS 340, RUSS 341, or RUSS 342

name: Spanish Language Certificate
text:
Spanish Language Certificate (BYU Center for Language Studies). This is the Spanish certificate. To earn the Spanish Language Certificate, complete one Spanish course in each of three categories -- Language, Civilization/Culture, and Literature. Spanish certificate course options:
1. Language Choose One: SPAN 321*, SPAN 323R (renumbered in Fall 2021 as 323A, 323B, and 323C), SPAN 325, SPAN 326 SPAN 360, SPAN 421, or SPAN 520 2. Civilization/Culture Choose One: SPAN 321*, SPAN 345, SPAN 447R, SPAN 355, SPAN 457R, or SPAN 395R 3. Literature Choose One: SPAN 321*, SPAN 330 *SPAN 321 is required as one of the three courses. It must be taken first, and may be counted toward any of the three categories (Language, Civilization/Culture, or Literature). Students may count SPAN 323A, 323B, or 323C to satisfy one course requirement in either of the following scenarios: 1. If 321 is completed as the Literature course option, then complete an option from the Civilization/Culture course options and complete 323R as the Language course option. 2. If 321 is completed as the Civilization/ Culture course option, then complete an option from the Literature course options and complete 323A, 323B, or 323C as the Language course option. Note: For MSB students, MSB 596R can be used to satisfy one course requirement.
